name: prism
description: Prism - Private media download, conversion, and transcription suite
author: clivingston33

scripts.test: node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types --test test/progress.test.ts test/jobs.test.ts test/conversion.test.ts test/media-tools.test.ts test/transcription.test.ts test/transcript-document.test.ts test/runtime-manifest.test.ts test/process-registry.test.ts test/format-selection.test.ts test/metadata-cache.test.ts test/progress-tracker.test.ts test/errors.test.ts test/temp-dirs.test.ts test/ipc-schemas.test.ts test/queue-state.test.ts test/ytdlp-args.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types --test --watch test/progress.test.ts test/jobs.test.ts test/conversion.test.ts test/media-tools.test.ts test/transcription.test.ts test/transcript-document.test.ts test/runtime-manifest.test.ts test/process-registry.test.ts test/format-selection.test.ts test/metadata-cache.test.ts test/progress-tracker.test.ts test/errors.test.ts test/temp-dirs.test.ts test/ipc-schemas.test.ts test/queue-state.test.ts test/ytdlp-args.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.build:win: npm run verify:resources && npm run build && electron-builder --win --publish never
